thesis: CapCard is an internal evidence-card marketplace for AI-generated or tool-generated capabilities. Each card summarizes what was attempted, what passed, what failed, what is bounded, what is not claimed, and what human review remains.
smallest_useful_product: A local/internal candidate list with validated evidence cards, traceability, limitations, no-go boundaries, and a human review checklist.
different_from_dashboard: A dashboard displays status; CapCard requires claim boundaries, evidence traceability, false upload/deploy fields, and reviewer workflow before promotion.
product_promise: Help reviewers understand capability evidence without overclaiming, uploading, or publishing prematurely.
must_never_claim: PETAL verified unless PETAL/API evidence exists
Hugging Face uploaded unless an upload was actually performed

product_modes.risks: false confidence if validators are weak
product_modes.next_required_work: ship one durable internal card flow

product_modes.value: keeps local PETAL-style rows separate from upload claims
product_modes.risks: confusing local style with PETAL verification

product_modes.next_required_work: public review policy and legal/product approval
